description: Fragment of a book (or booklist) that belonged to the Head of the Gola Daniel b. Hisdai, end of the 12th century. Seems like the book was given as a gift to Nahum ha-Kohen b. Mansur, and belonged to Daniel b. Hisdai from April 25, 1135, then to Ya’aqov b. Eli from August 1174, and then was given to Nahum. The book contains parts written by Rav Se’adya Gaon and Rav Shemuel ha-Kohen Gaon b. Hofni. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #92) VMR
